description: DEFEND THE SOVIET UNION SAYS CALL FROM COMMUNIST PARTY TO NEW YORK WORKERS Demonstrate on International AntiWar Day in Union Sq Aug 1 Down Tools at 4 P M Stand By the Workers and Peasants of USSR Against War Lord Hirelings of Capitalism Continued from Page One cn the Siberian frontier by this vas sal and puppet government of China Insolent Provocation The seizing of the RussoChinese Eastern Railway the arrest impris onment deportations of Soviet workers the massing of tens of thousands of troops on the Man i churian border are insolent acts of provocation are the beginning of a definite move to invade the Soviet Union to destroy the revolution in the land of the Soviets and to let loose a reign of terror and mass reorder unparalleled in history ihe capitalist press the poison mongers of the bourgeoisie that slander every workers strike that lies daily against the working class the strikebreaking organs of the ex ploiters are now slandering the Soviet Union championing the cause of the war lords and voicing the in terests of the imperialists against the Soviet Union Despite the open provocation of the servile Chinese government against the Soviet Union despite the
